text:
There once lived a curious girl named Alice.

Alice dreamed of exploring the mysterious forest behind her house.

One day, she decided she must visit.

She walked there every afternoon.

Finds were delightful: wildflowers she had never seen before.

birds she loved songs.

Hours spent dancing amongst blossoms.

One afternoon, an old owl saw Alice.

Feeling protective, she swooped down.

But Alice was quick—a clever fox.

They danced.

The owl didn clocked her.

They flew off together.

That evening.

Alice told her dreams.

The owl nodded sagely.

"You think?"

Alice nodded.

"It's impossible."

They talked. They flew.

Each time they met.

Alice wooed charming things.

They lived happily ever after.

That owl liked rabbits.

So they lived.

That's how they—

Still live.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
